originalTitle: Coding a MOBA for AI/RL to play, Dev Day #5
title: Implementing Leveling and Discussing Pre-Computed Pathing for MOBA AI Environment
summary: Continued development of a MOBA environment for AI/RL, implementing a leveling system and discussing pre-computation of shortest paths between waypoints for efficient pathfinding. Evaluated vision mechanics in forest terrain but deferred pre-computed pathing implementation.
